orientation: flip_vertical (reverse Z rows; preserve X left/right)

orientation_validation.method: raw grid indexed as [z,x], centered world coordinates, no axis flip

coordinate_system.units: map pixels (one pixel per world metre for the full-size render)

source.selection: prevent-building named/tagged colliders affecting building blocks

coordinates.world: Unity metres: X east/west, Y elevation, Z north/south
coordinates.map_position: map metres from bottom-left: x = world_x + world_size/2; y = world_z + world_size/2
coordinates.map_origin: (0, 0) is the bottom-left of the playable map; positive X is right and positive Y is up

coordinates.image: X left-to-right; positive world Z points upward

generation.collision_model: 16-direction, radius-3, 200 m sphere sweeps over serialized TerrainCollider geometry and packaged placed-prefab collision footprints
limitations: only colliders present during WorldSetup affect this route; later SpawnHandler populations and loaded saves do not
unpackaged or version-mismatched placed-prefab collision templates are reported in generation metadata
live cargo spawn, movement, and egress state are not part of this static export
